evidence: "This is one of the best movies of the year!!! I had no idea this was a comedic action movie!!!"
"The plot is not bad, the acting is not bad."
"You have to assume this movie is going to be silly."
"Starts slow, but is a great movie."
"The series starts slow, but picks up really well a few episodes in."
"Great acting by all, but I suppose this movie wasn't about the acting or the actors."
"I always thought Danny Trejo was too serious in his movies."
"I just don't remember Wonder Woman being as strong as Superman..."
"Amazing how well little Saroo (Sunny Pawar) and his brother Guddu (Abhishek Bharate) acted on screen."
"WOW! What a story! It is sad kids have to go through what these kids go through."
"I am sad Spock is no longer with us, but happy for this story that was shared."

additional_patterns.name: humor_preference
evidence: "Totally wraps up at the end. Yes, it is stupid, silly, totally moronic!"
"I expected a lot more comedic scenes, but am surprised I like this drama."

summary: The user enjoys action and drama films with a comedic touch, often appreciating strong performances and emotional storytelling. They have a mixed view on pacing and narrative complexity, indicating a preference for engaging yet straightforward plots.
